AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit methodology rationale: held decisions.md (strict-bar/append-only commitments), preserved tmp/ draft, logged the hold in daybook plus a blocked entry in followups.md — each file's strict bar named.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis is not applicable.

AR3.justification: All file references use bare relative paths (daybook/2026-05-17.md, followups.md, tmp/adr-draft.md, decisions.md) with ISO date anchors and resolve to real workspace files.

AR4.justification: All actions are append-only or new-file creates with ISO-dated daybook; no in-place mutation of decisions.md or tmp/adr-draft.md, so a re-run would only create or append, not conflict.
